title: Roasted Jamaican Tagliere
description: A cozy roasted dish featuring tender Jamaican flavors served on a tagliere.
instructions: Preheat the broiler and adjust the oven rack accordingly.
Toss the sweet potatoes with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil, salt, and black pepper, and spread on a baking sheet.
Roast the sweet potatoes in the oven at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes roast, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the thinly sliced red onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the grated ginger, minced garlic, allspice, and nutmeg to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the skillet to the oven with the sweet potatoes for an additional 5 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
Serve the roasted sweet potatoes with the Jamaican sauce spooned on top, on a tagliere.
Season with additional salt and black pepper, to taste.
